question_html: Which of the following words can be best replaced with ‘Cognitive’?
Which of the following words is an antonym of ‘Meticulous’?
The word ‘Startle’ means–
Which of the following words is spelt incorrectly?
solution_html: Correct spelling- Segregation

question_html: Which word is misspelled?
solution_html: The correct spelling is- ‘Retrieve’

question_html: Valentina Tareshkova was selected for this project_____among more than______applicants.
The train plunged ____ forest and unseen branches brushed against the windows.
After the feed I really got my teeth into the strokes. What is the meaning of the underlined idiom?
options_html: To become deeply involved in or focus on something with enthusiasm
To completely give up on something difficult
To casually glance at something without much interest
correct_answer_html: To become deeply involved in or focus on something with enthusiasm
solution_html: Get one’s teeth into অর্থ প্রবলভাবে শুরু করা।

question_html: It turned ______ that his letter was still on its way.
The royal scholars received handsome fees and happily went home. Here the underlined word is functioning as–
solution_html: 'home'- এখানে স্থানবাচক অর্থে adverb of place হিসেবে ব্যবহৃত হয়েছে। এছাড়াও, went-verb- কে ‍যদি ‘কোথায়’ দ্বারা প্রশ্ন করা হয় তবে উত্তর হিসেবে পাওয়া যায়। তাই, home- শব্দটি এখানে Adverb।

question_html: Freud’s theory contributed to the popularity of dream interpretation. The word ‘dream’ is acting as–
solution_html: dream শব্দটি বাক্যের interpretation(noun)- কে modify করায় dream- শব্দটি এখানে adjective হিসেবে কাজ করছে। যেহেতু, dream শব্দটি গঠনগতভাবে noun কিন্তু বাক্যে adjective হিসেবে কাজ করছে সেহেতু এটিকে noun adjective-ও বলা যায়।

question_html: The noun form of the word ‘Persuade’
solution_html: এখানে persuasive এবং persuaded হলো adjective, persuation একটি ভুল শব্দ।

question_html: The place and time in which the action takes place is called____.
William Blake is an_______poet.
When spending becomes a/an______behaviour, it makes life stressful.
solution_html: বাক্যে behaviour যেহেতু noun হিসেবে বসেছে, সেহেতু একে শুধু কোনো adj-word ই modify করে পূর্বে বসতে পারবে। তাই বাক্যের অর্থানুযায়ী এখানে impulsive শব্দটি সঠিক উত্তর হিসেবে বসবে।

question_html: Had I the papers you needed,______.
options_html: I would be given to you.

question_html: As Elizabeth and her friends came down, two sampan-wallahs besought them with yells. In this sentence, the base form of the underlined verb is-
solution_html: beseech (v1) besought/beseeched (v2) besought (v3)

question_html: The infrastructure ____ to sustain tourism such as roads can contribute to environmental degradation.
‘And blossoms blown away’ is an example of–
solution_html: পাশাপাশি অবস্থিত শব্দের প্রথম consonant sound এর পুনরাবৃত্তি ঘটলে তাকে Alliteration বলে। এখানে blossoms blown শব্দ দুটিতে প্রথম consonant sound এর পুনরাবৃত্তি হয়েছে। তাই এটি Alliteration হবে।

question_html: What type of sentence is “I begged him to send me some money so that I could buy a bus ticket”?
solution_html: বাক্যে, sub-ordinating conjunction হিসেবে so that ব্যবহৃত হয়ে “I begged him to send me some money” এবং “I could buy a bus ticket” clause- দুটিকে যুক্ত করেছে। তাই বাক্যটি একটি complex sentence।

question_html: Liza had given me two____.
The success of an experiment often relies on the methods ______ chosen.
solution_html:
বাক্যটিতে antecedent হিসেবে the methods বসেছে এবং এটির জন্য relative pronoun হিসেবে which বসেছে এবং plural subject হওয়ায় plural verb হিসেবে are বসবে।

antecedent (singular) + Relative pronoun (singular) + verb (singular)

আবার,

antecedent (plural) + Relative pronoun (plural) + verb (plural)।

question_html: He avoided making the same mistakes again. The underlined word is a/an–
solution_html: Verb + ing যখন বাক্যে noun এর মতো কাজ করে তখন তাকে Gerund বলে। এখানে making প্রদত্ত বাক্যটিতে avoided (verb) এর object হিসেবে noun এর কাজ করছে বিধায় এটা একটি Gerund।

question_html: Identify the correct sentence.
options_html: He was used to work hard.
He was used to working hard.
He has used to working hard.
correct_answer_html: He was used to working hard.
solution_html: be used to + (v+ing) -এই structure অনুযায়ী “He was used to working hard”- বাক্যটি সঠিক উত্তর।

question_html: When dams are built, thousands of people_____.
She tried to be serious but she couldn’t help_____.
The beauty of _____ ancient castle is matched by ____ serenity of the surrounding landscape.
solution_html: এখানে, নির্দিষ্ট ancient castle হওয়াতে এর পূর্বে determiner হিসেবে the বসেছে। পরবর্তীতে, the + noun + of -এই structure অনুযায়ী the বসবে।

question_html: Due to a conflict of interest, the judge was forced to _______ herself from hearing the case and _______ from voting in the decision.
We try to make sure that children don't feel ___ on their first day at school.
“All the world’s a stage.” The sentence is an example of–
solution_html: as/like ব্যতীত যদি দুটি বস্তুর মধ্যে তুলনা করা হয়, তবে সেই figure of speech কে metaphor বলে।

question_html: The plural form of ‘Bureau’
The opposite gender of ‘Emperor’
Srabon got his transcript____to the university.
solution_html: Causative verb এর নিয়ম অনুসারে subject action receiver হলে Sub + get + action receiver + v3 + ext. এই structure অনুসারে বসবে।

question_html: Choose the correct sentence.
options_html: The authority has recommended that the employee should given five days’ leave.
My elder brother suggested me smoking be given up.
It is essential that he goes to the meeting.
I suggest that she be more careful next time.
correct_answer_html: I suggest that she be more careful next time.
solution_html: Subjunctive এর নিয়ম অনুসারে বাক্যে subject এর পরে suggest+that থাকলে পরের subject এর পরে verb এর base form বসবে।

question_html: The traffic was_____ heavier than I anticipated.
Choose the incorrect sentence with inversion.
options_html: Not only did she finish the project, but also helped others.
No sooner had he arrived than the meeting started.
Under no circumstances they will cancel the event.
Never have I seen such a beautiful place.
correct_answer_html: Under no circumstances they will cancel the event.
solution_html: Inversion হলে বাক্যে auxiliary verb sub এর আগে চলে আসে। তবে "Under no circumstances they will cancel the event" বাক্যে 'Will' subject এর পরে বসেছে। তাই এটি ভুল বাক্য।

question_html: I didn’t have my breakfast today, and ______.
Left____ himself, the dog will eat anything and everything.
_____ the team had prepared thoroughly for the tournament, they faced unexpected challenges that affected their performance.

Change the following sentence into complex.

“I don’t know his father’s name.”
options_html: I do not know what name his father’s has.
I do not know what is his father’s name.
I do not know what his father’s name is.
I do not know that what his father’s name is.
correct_answer_html: I do not know what his father’s name is.
solution_html: “I do not know what his father’s name is”- বাক্যটিতে ২টি finite verb ও একটি sub-ordinating conjunction- what ব্যবহৃত হয়েছে তাই এটি সঠিক complex sentence হয়েছে।

question_html: The exclamatory form of the sentence ‘A little learning is a dangerous thing’ is–
options_html: How dangerous a little learning is!
Isn’t a little learning a dangerous thing!
What a dangerous thing a little learning is!
What a danger a little learning is!
correct_answer_html: What a dangerous thing a little learning is!
solution_html: Assertive sentence -এ সাধারণত adjective এর পূর্বে a/an থাকলে assertive to exclamatory তে রূপান্তর করার ক্ষেত্রে বাক্যের সঠিক structure হবে- What + a/an + adjective+ verb + note of Exclamation (!)

question_html: A ‘Ballad’ is –
“The channel broadcast the documentary.” The best passive form is–
options_html: The documentary is broadcast by the channel.
The documentary is broadcasted by the channel.
The documentary was broadcasted by the channel.
The documentary was broadcast by the channel.
correct_answer_html: The documentary was broadcast by the channel.
solution_html: broadcast এর V3 broadcast-ই হবে। প্রশ্নোক্ত বাক্যটি Past Indefinite Tense-এ থাকায় Passive করতে হলে, বাক্যের গঠন হবে- প্রদত্ত বাক্যের object + was/were +V3 + by + প্রদত্ত বাক্যের subject।

question_html: The solution of the problem dawn____me.

Choose the indirect form of the sentence.

Karim says, “I did not go.”
options_html: Karim said that he did not go.
Karim said that he had’t gone.
Karim says that he did not go.
correct_answer_html: Karim says that he did not go.
solution_html: Direct speech- এর reporting verb যদি present- এ থাকে, তবে indirect করার সময় reported speech এর কোনো পরিবর্তন হবে না। শুধু person এর পরিবর্তন হবে।

question_html: Change into reported form: She said to me, “Why don’t you come on Monday?”
options_html: She told me to not go on Monday.
She said me why did not she go on Monday.
She asked me why I did not go on Monday.
She asked me not to go that day.
correct_answer_html: She asked me why I did not go on Monday.

question_html: The rebel forces pulled_____ a surprisingly successful offensive against the better equipped government troops.
The boy always studies hard,______?
solution_html: এখানে, উক্ত বাক্যটি affirmative হওয়ায়, এর tag হবে negative এবং sub অনুযায়ী pronoun হিসেবে বসবে he। তাই, বাক্যটির সঠিক tag হলো doesn’t he।

question_html: Identify the underlined part of this sentence : Please try to think out of the box.
solution_html: কোনো phrase এর শুরুতে Preposition এবং শেষে Noun থাকলে গঠনের বিবেচনায় সেটি Prepositional Phrase হবে।

question_html: Though he is poor, he is honest. The underlined part of the sentence is–
solution_html: Though, Although ইত্যাদি যুক্ত sub- ordinate clause- টি সাধারণত adverbial clause হয়।

question_html: Choose the correct sentence.
options_html: Having arrived late for practice, a written excuse was needed.
Having arrived late for practice, the team captain needed a written excuse.
Having arrived late for practice, need the excuse the captain.
Having arrived late for practice, an application was needed.
correct_answer_html: Having arrived late for practice, the team captain needed a written excuse.
solution_html: Dangling modifier যেহেতু বাক্যের শুরুতে বসে পরবর্তীতে থাকা noun/pronoun- কে modify করে সেহেতু এখানে “Having arrived late for practice” phrase টি ‘the team captain’ কে modify করেছে। তাই “Having arrived late for practice, the team captain needed a written excuse” - বাক্যটি সঠিক উত্তর।

question_html: Choose the correct sentence.
options_html: There is an affinity two language.
I still adhere with my plan.
He is alarmed to any safety.
The meeting was adjourned for a week.
correct_answer_html: The meeting was adjourned for a week.
solution_html:
ভুল অপশনগুলোর সঠিক উত্তর:

There is an affinity between two languages.

I still adhere to my plan.

He is alarmed for any safety.

question_html: Which of these sentences is incorrect?
options_html: We are sitting for an exam.
solution_html: পরীক্ষার্থী হিসেবে পরীক্ষা দেওয়া অর্থে appear at, sit for, go in for, take, do ব্যবহৃত হয়। আর পরীক্ষক হিসেবে পরীক্ষা নেওয়া অর্থে give ব্যবহৃত হয়। পরীক্ষার্থী হিসেবে পরীক্ষা দেওয়া অর্থে give ব্যবহার করলে সেটি ভুল হবে।

question_html: Identify the correct sentence.
options_html: Time and tide waits for none.
Slow and steady win the race.
Either he or his brother is guilty.
I, you and Habib are present.
correct_answer_html: Either he or his brother is guilty.
solution_html:
Correct sentences:

Time and tide wait for none.

Slow and steady wins the race.

You, Habib and I are present.

question_html: Identify the error in the sentence: Two-third of the students are present in the class today.
solution_html: আমরা জানি, fraction এর ক্ষেত্রে লব যদি ১ এর থেকে বেশি হয়, তবে হরের সাথে -s যুক্ত হয়। অর্থাৎ Two-third এর স্থলে Two-thirds হবে।

question_html: Choose the sentence with appropriate punctuation.
options_html: I wanted to help but I did not know how.
The movie which I wanted to watch is now available online.
The dog barked loudly it scared the children.
Don’t touch that; it’s hot.
correct_answer_html: Don’t touch that; it’s hot.

question_html: _____interacting with a guest speaker, students can gather information online.
Choose the best translation of “কর্তৃপক্ষ তাকে তিরস্কার করলো” from the alternative below-
options_html: The authorities took him to book.
The authorities gave reins to him.
The authorities took him to task.
correct_answer_html: The authorities took him to task.

question_html: A person who has come to live permanently in a country from his own is called–
Legislature: Laws :: ________:________
